reference: Ya mere, ịgbanwe ụzọ ndụ gị na ịnọgide na-arụsi ọrụ ike na inwe ezigbo ntụrụndụ nwere ike ịgwọ gị, tinyere ọchịchọ ịga nke ọma.

text: Mba, enweghị m ọzịza ọbụla.
hypothesis: mba ewé moses obola.
reference: Mba, enweghị m ọzịza ọbụla.

text: Nke abuo, ọgwụ mgbe nile na nleba anya, nke ị ga-emerịrị. I kwesịrị inwe ezigbo ndụ dịka ịzere nri abụba, mmanụ na oke kalori.
hypothesis: kabla ogun benile na lebanya nke iyi gimeviri ike siri me ezindo dika izewe unvya obba manu na uke akalori
reference: Nke abuo, ọgwụ mgbe nile na nleba anya, nke ị ga-emerịrị. I kwesịrị inwe ezigbo ndụ dịka ịzere nri abụba, mmanụ na oke kalori.

text: Eze ukwu m rere ere , ike kpatara ya bu maka eze ukwu nke ozo ewepuru. Maka na  eze Ukwu nkea ere na, O na afu m ezigbo ufu na m na eri ihe, na m ba ata kwa atu.
hypothesis: Ezuku mre re re, iye patra yabo makyezu kunkoze wepo. Makane ezuku nka re re re, ona afumez bu funa mne ri he, namna atakwazo.
reference: Eze ukwu m rere ere , ike kpatara ya bu maka eze ukwu nke ozo ewepuru. Maka na  eze Ukwu nkea ere na, O na afu m ezigbo ufu na m na eri ihe, na m ba ata kwa atu.

text: Ọ bụrụ na nke a emee, ị nwere ike ịmalite iji otu ọgwụ ahụ, ma ana m atụ aro ka ị nyochaa nwa ahụ site na dọkịta ụmụaka. Enwere m olileanya na azịza m nyeere gị aka.
hypothesis: obron ankaa yɛ me yɛ onyanki ma lite yi ji otsu a waa ma ana ma atsua roka yi no chaa waa ho sika na dokenta ho muaka emore mu lia na azizam nire gaka.

text: Ya mere amalitere m iji ego afọ m kwurịta okwu ahụ, ma anọ m na-ekwurịta ya kemgbe ahụ.

text: A kwadoghị m ịnọ ala na sauna otu awa mana ana m anọbu ala na sauna nkeji iri tupu na oge m megasịrị ahụ.
hypothesis: Akwado gim ina alana sauna otsuawa, mana ana mama mbua alana sauna, nkejiri tupu na oge umegaseri aho.
reference: A kwadoghị m ịnọ ala na sauna otu awa mana ana m anọbu ala na sauna nkeji iri tupu na oge m megasịrị ahụ.

text: Ma ọ bụ ọ nwere ike ịbụ site na ịwa ahụ n 'onwe ya.
